parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM (SELECT * FROM gda_action_items ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200) t), '[]'::json) as items, (SELECT count(*) FROM gda_action_items)::int as total;
INSERT INTO gda_action_items (item, owner, deadline, status, source_meeting) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5) RETURNING id
UPDATE gda_action_items SET status = $1 WHERE id = $2 RETURNING id, status
DELETE FROM gda_action_items WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const routeData = $('Route Action').first()?.json || {}; if (routeData.action === '_validation_error') { return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: routeData.error, field: routeData.field }); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: true }); })() }}
